SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.util.scenario

Class AntiSurgeDynamicBenchmark.BenchmarkCompressor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.process.SimulationBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.TwoPortEquipment
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.Compressor
neqsim.process.util.scenario.AntiSurgeDynamicBenchmark.BenchmarkCompressor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Runnable, AutoSizeable, CapacityConstrainedEquipment, CompressorInterface, ProcessEquipmentInterface, TwoPortInterface, StateVectorProvider, ProcessElementInterface, SimulationInterface, NamedInterface
Enclosing class:
AntiSurgeDynamicBenchmark
private static final class AntiSurgeDynamicBenchmark.BenchmarkCompressor extends Compressor
Minimal Compressor subclass that exposes a directly settable distance to surge so the benchmark can impose a transparent gas-path surrogate while still driving the production AntiSurgeController through its real surge-margin interface.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

    • setDistanceToSurge

    • getDistanceToSurge

      public double getDistanceToSurge()
      getDistanceToSurge.

      Returns the benchmark-imposed distance to surge rather than evaluating a compressor map.

      Specified by:
      getDistanceToSurge in interface CompressorInterface
      Overrides:
      getDistanceToSurge in class Compressor
      Returns:
      a double
